landing.heroSubtitle: Improve your CV, practice interviews with AI, and find opportunities that align with your profile. All in one place.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to stand out professionally
features.subtitle: Smart tools that adapt to your profile and guide you step by step.

cv.title: AI-powered smart CV
cv.description: Create an ATS-optimized resume that highlights your achievements and adapts to every industry. Our engine analyzes and improves each section automatically.

diagnostic.title: Career diagnostic
diagnostic.description: Discover your professional profile with RIASEC analysis and receive personalized recommendations.

interview.title: Interview simulator
interview.description: Practice with an AI interviewer that adapts questions to your industry and provides real-time feedback.

opportunities.title: Opportunities that fit you
opportunities.description: Our algorithm matches your profile with thousands of listings to show only those that truly match your skills and goals.

how.label: How it works
how.title: From preparation to offer, in three steps
how.step1Desc: Complete a smart diagnostic that identifies your strengths, interests, and the types of roles where you can excel.
how.step2Desc: Build an optimized CV and practice interviews with personalized real-time feedback.
how.step3Desc: Receive job offers aligned with your profile and apply with a CV tailored to each position.

deepDive.cvTitle: Your best professional version, in minutes
deepDive.cvDesc: No more hours struggling with formatting. Our smart editor analyzes your experience and generates a CV that passes ATS filters and captures recruiters' attention.
deepDive.interviewTitle: Practice until you feel total confidence
deepDive.interviewDesc: Our simulator reproduces real interview scenarios adapted to your role and industry. Receive immediate feedback on your answers.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Real stories of transformation
testimonials.t1Text: I didn't know how to build my CV without experience. MoonJab guided me step by step and the RIASEC diagnostic helped me understand which roles suited me best.
testimonials.t2Text: I practiced interviews with AI until I felt confident. In my first real interview, I responded with a confidence I had never had before.
testimonials.t3Text: I used guest mode first to try it out. Within a week I subscribed because the opportunity matching showed me positions that truly aligned with my profile.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One simple plan, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Access all tools at an affordable price. Try free in guest mode before you decide.

cta.title: Your next career move starts here
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who already transformed their careers with MoonJab.
